CrimeFlix - Free Crime TV That’ll Keep You Hooked

programme.title: The Perfect Hunt
programme.desc: On this hunt Daryl guides 5 clients and Claudio to 48 ducks and 48 geese to wrap up the perfect trip!

programme.title: Meet the Bennettes on their Multi-Species South Dakota Line
programme.desc: Tune in for plenty of excitement as Matt and Nancy Bennette run their trapline. Matt is an old pro, while Nancy is new to the craft. Nancys anticipation and excitement is palpable as she wears her emotions on her sleeve

programme.title: Sweetgrass First Nation - Part 1
programme.desc: Join Shawna as she heads to Saskatchewan to hunt Sweetgrass First Nation with Lance owner of Battle River Cree Outdoors. (Part 1 of 3)

programme.title: PK Lures Walleye Fishing
programme.desc: We do a little bait testing with Curt Reeff, owner of PK lures. First we fish on the Missouri River then we head north to Manitoba, where Bryan Bogdan and Kurt test out some of the same baits and color combinations on Northern Manitoba walleyes

programme.title: The Pipeline: Alberta Kool-Aid Mans COP28
programme.desc: "Derek Fildebrandt, Nigel Hannaford & Cory Morgan discuss; Notleys retirement?; Liberal speaker death watch

programme.title: Sweetgrass First Nation - Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of Shawna's trip to Saskatchewan to hunt Sweetgrass First Nation with Lance owner of Battle River Cree Outdoors. (Part 2 of 3)

programme.title: Hot Seat - Part 1
programme.desc: Dry field, lots of ducks and the best hide you’ll see this year! So much action that we had to split it into two parts. Don’t miss the first half of this epic hunt!"

programme.title: Whitetail Rut in Texas: Feast or Famine - Part 2
programme.desc: The rutting action in South Texas really heats up as Steve of Yamaha Outdoors continues his pursuit of whitetail during the rut

programme.title: Northern Saskatchewan Black Bear
programme.desc: "Calvin takes friends Luke Alberts and Darcy Lodoen on their first black bear hunt in Northern Saskatchewan

programme.title: Mayor Gondek Should Resign
programme.desc: Cory Morgan, Nigel Hannaford & Dave Naylor discuss; Does COP28 really mean a fossil-fuel phase out? Unlikely; Liberal Party's diversity not their strength this week; Something unhealthy about Canada's waiting lists for care

programme.title: Season 3, Episode 8
programme.desc: A statement from the head of the CBSA Union, Tracey Wilson provides an update on Bill C21 and is the Liberal government reneging on their promise to compensate gun owners for their now prohibited firearms?

programme.title: Fighting For Our Rights
programme.desc: We learn about what's been going on in the courts in an attempt to overturn Bill-C21 gun ban laws, what the government's decisions have been thus far and what the next steps are in the fight for our rights

programme.title: Ho-Ho Hamas
programme.desc: Derek Fildebrandt, Nigel Hannaford & Cory Morgan discuss; Scotia Bank: Excessive immigration numbers driving inflation; Ottawas E-car mandate; AB to continue fight against Fed's plastic ban

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 2
programme.desc: Last season in Part 1, Rochelle Partridge passed up a monster framed 8, rolling the dice in hopes that the buck could survive another year. This episode shows just what a year can do.

programme.title: The Long Game - Part 3
programme.desc: The conclusion to Rochelle's unbelievable years long hunt, and the massive reward that can come when rolling the dice.

programme.title: The Maybe Buck
programme.desc: Taylor Partridge's Excalibur crossbow hunt for a MONSTER typical whitetail. A summer's work leads to a decision on whether or not to hunt a deer that turns out to be one of the largest in Canadian Whitetail history.

programme.title: These Colours Run Deep
programme.desc: This week Marc and Bill head out to meet up with some of the guys to go after some geese.

programme.title: Fun
programme.desc: This week Marc, Amber and Lorne are out hitting some trails looking for grouse.

programme.title: Property Diversity
programme.desc: If you want a property with a little added value, seek to find the ones with a strong diversity of hunting opportunities.

programme.title: Property Financing
programme.desc: DDH Properties real estate expert Jason Rieckmann talks about the financial considerations you should be taking before you make the jump at buying your dream hunting property.

programme.title: Measure in Memories
programme.desc: Editor-in-Chief Dan Schmidt returns to his roots of shooting, what makes him happy, and explains why you should have no apologies for doing the exact same thing.

programme.title: Bed Bucks
programme.desc: The DDH team shares best practices for identifying and hunting whitetail bedding areas.

programme.title: A Time to Talk
programme.desc: Tension runs high as Dan Schmidt moderates a discussion of all things whitetail hunting between esteemed whitetail expert Dr. Stephen Ditchkoff of the Auburn University Deer Lab and famous rock star and hunting activist, Ted Nugent.

programme.title: Jason's Place
programme.desc: DDH Properties real estate expert Jason Rieckmann walks us through his own dream deer hunting property and shows us how easy it is to set up a brand new Orion hunting blind.

programme.title: Modern Heroes - Part 1
programme.desc: Treestand accidents unfortunately happen every year despite efforts of public awareness. On this episode of Modern Hunter we showcase a mock hunting accident and the modern heroes that are standing by to answer the call.

programme.title: Modern Heroes - Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of our Modern Heroes special, features the Rhinelander, Wisconsin volunteer fire department as they answer a call to save a fallen hunter.

programme.title: Off Season
programme.desc: With a last minute invite from his good friend Brad Rucks, Mark Scroggins get his opportunity in the off season at his very first trophy axis buck.

programme.title: Tennessee
programme.desc: Join Host Alexa Score as she visits some of the best off-road parks in Tennessee.

programme.title: Rugged Radios
programme.desc: Join Host Alexa Score and the team from Rugged Radios as they transform a Polaris General into a roving taco truck.

programme.title: Early Season Waterfowl in Saskatchewan
programme.desc: Chris Dorsey returns to the top of the flyway for his own annual migration as he hunts early season waterfowl in Saskatchewan with good friend Steve Hicks.

programme.title: The Ibex Slam
programme.desc: Chris Dorsey looks to complete the Ibex slam by taking the Ronda and Beceite subspecies in the mountains of southern Spain.

programme.title: Fourteen
programme.desc: After a horrible hunt in the Hill Country, Blaine spends his last day in South Texas looking for a unicorn 14-point buck.

programme.title: Best of North American Big Game Hunting
programme.desc: Kristy Titus takes you behind the scenes on a more personal level, showcasing some of her favorite North American big game hunts for moose, mountain goat, Dall sheep and mountain caribou.

programme.title: Timing is Everything
programme.desc: Join Kristy Titus for this episode of Pursue the Wild where she hunts whitetail in Missouri and Kansas.

programme.title: Cash Out Season - Oregon Steens Mule Deer
programme.desc: Kristy Titus prepares for her second mule deer hunt in the coveted Steens Mountain unit in Oregon. Join her as she cashes out her preference points and completes her final hunt as an Oregon resident.

programme.title: Pike & Smallmouth Bass
programme.desc: Casting lures for weed & structure pike and smallmouth bass.

programme.title: Trolling Walleye & Lake Trout
programme.desc: Great Lakes open-water walleye and lake trout.

programme.title: Season's Highlights
programme.desc: Jigging lake trout, walleye, top-water smallmouth bass, cranking walleye and coastal river salmon.

programme.title: A Look Back
programme.desc: The guys look back on an unbelievable year of fishing. From offshore giants to bays, this was one action packed season.

programme.title: Going Deep in the Skinny
programme.desc: The captains take a deep look at flats fishing in Panama City, Florida.

programme.title: Florida, Meet Texas
programme.desc: Capt. Todd & Capt. Jamie take the Towee Boat on a cast & blast dream trip.

programme.title: Colorado Dream Hunt
programme.desc: A culmination of volunteers and donors come together to give our recipient the absolute hunt of a lifetime! First, we join Dustin on an intense spot n stalk hunt for an elk followed by a good old-fashioned prairie dog shoot.

programme.title: Hunting for a Giant
programme.desc: Our first hunt takes us along with our recipient Jacob whose dream of taking down a giant bull moose is about to become a reality. Then we join Brody, who is new to hunting but has the big dream of taking a big ol' trophy whitetail buck!

programme.title: One Shot Moose Kill
programme.desc: We start off with Keegan whose dream is to take a crack at one the largest animals in North America, then O.A.F. star Gabe is back for his first turkey hunt, lastly returning hunter Jamison is on a spot & stalk North Dakota elk hunt of epic portions.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 12
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 1
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: The OGs vs Newbees Hunting Competition: Week 2
programme.desc: A hunting competition featuring the Whitetail Frenzy originals aka The OGs vs a group of new staff members aka The Newbees.

programme.title: Jumbo Perch
programme.desc: Mitchell and Roger target jumbo perch through the ice, camping out over night doing a catch and cook!

programme.title: Dreams Become Reality
programme.desc: The Moment of Truth TV crew experienced some serious heart break throughout the fall, but persevered and were rewarded with a unforgettable season having their best season yet.

programme.title: Back to Back Bruins
programme.desc: Mitchell targets a beautiful black bear in the boreal forests of Alberta.

programme.title: Up to Us
programme.desc: Follow along as David takes us through an Iowa archery season, explaining why hunters do what they do.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Watch as the Holder's release the humorous side of Raised Hunting. If you can't laugh at yourself, who can you laugh at? Someone else...

programme.title: Living
programme.desc: Join the Holder family as they take a look at an entire hunting season and how hunting mimics life.

programme.title: Feed the Whale
programme.desc: For the maiden voyage of the new Kingfisher Boats 3025 GFX Brendan wanted to bring on a very special guest. An expert of the ocean and everyone’s favourite 6 ton mammal, Fin the whale, official mascot of the Vancouver Canucks.

programme.title: Walters Cove Resort
programme.desc: Brendan Morrison and Dave Babych head to Kyuquot for an unforgettable trip to Walters Cove Resort, owned by the Kyuquot/Checleseht First Nations.

programme.title: Marlin for Marty
programme.desc: Legendary NHL Goaltender Marty Turco joins Brendan and Steve Rae in Cabo San Lucas for an epic day on the water.

programme.title: Mesquite
programme.desc: Texas is known for being target rich, and the boys have proven that. They shot so many bucks in October it barely fits into an episode!

programme.title: Spot & Stalk
programme.desc: It’s bear season in Alaska, and Mike has been waiting four years to get this permit. He’s got an itch to take down a big bear, and the Savage is sighted in.

programme.title: Axis Heat
programme.desc: It’s hot in Texas, but that doesn’t mean you can’t get in a good axis hunt. It doesn’t get better than walking, stalking and dropping an axis deer.

programme.title: The Bonnechere Cup
programme.desc: STV heads to Eganville for the Bonnechere Cup but Jeff isn't taking the quick route, he's riding Goldmember to it!

programme.title: Trails of the French Fry Capital of the World
programme.desc: STV heads back to New Brunswick and hits the trails in the french fry capital of the world.

programme.title: World Snowmobile HQ & CKX Gear
programme.desc: STV reads a book this week, checks out some gear from CKX and Jeff takes out the crap cans for a ride to see how their running!

programme.title: Amber's First Deer
programme.desc: Jimmy Sites guides singer Amber McLemore to her first deer ever, then they co-write a song that is produced by John Carter Cash.

programme.title: One MOORE to Go
programme.desc: Jimmy Sites joins Keith Moore for the last deer hunt of the season and of Spiritual Outdoor Adventures 22-year run.

programme.title: Texas Gators - Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of a hunt on the Texas coastline, Blake Barnett along with Conservation Equity Partners complete the task of baiting and harvesting alligator.

programme.title: Return To Whitetail - Part 1
programme.desc: After previously guiding a successful hunt earlier in the year in the area, Blake Barnett returns to the Lowrance in the Texas panhandle to hunt whitetail deer

programme.title: Return To Whitetail - Part 2
programme.desc: Blake Barnett continues his hunt for old whitetail deer on the Lowrance Ranch of North Texas

programme.title: Fall on Stump Lake
programme.desc: Don Freschi and Brian Chan fly fish Stump Lake in the fall using a variety of fly patterns; mainly Baby Damsels, Blobs and Leeches.

programme.title: Chironomids 101
programme.desc: Dale Freschi and good friend Ted MacDonald fly fish a beautiful lake in the Cariboo region of BC using chironomid patterns

programme.title: Fly Fishing the Weed Beds
programme.desc: Don and Dale Freschi experience extremely windy conditions that forces them into the weeds for some crazy fishing

programme.title: Team200 Canada
programme.desc: Clay Charlton , owner of Take-Em Outfitters, is the newest member of Team200 and shares his 2021 season as he chases giant whitetails in Alberta and Saskatchewan

programme.title: Cree River Monsters
programme.desc: Team200 visits the Cree River Lodge in Northern Saskatchewan to hunt giant black bear. Spot & stalk archery action plus monster northern pike!

programme.title: RAW Whitetails
programme.desc: Team200 members Chris Schmidt, Brian Rhodd, Jordan Finnigan and Mike Dempsey chase whitetails across the Midwest

programme.title: Iowa Gun Season
programme.desc: Iowa is a magical place where whitetail hunters' dreams can come true. In this episode, Jerry finds himself back in this coveted state chasing some monster bucks with Cole

programme.title: Passing The Torch
programme.desc: It's rifle season in Pennsylvania this week and we are joined by Blake VanTussenbrook and Preston Holdren and their sons. Their boys have never killed a buck before so we invited them out to try to get them on their first buck ever!

programme.title: Sooner" Or Later"
programme.desc: We're headed out to Oklahoma to follow along with the Sharp brothers as they hunt whitetails in their home state. You never know what to expect with these two but one thing you can always rely on is that they always have some big deer to go after!

programme.title: Creative
programme.desc: Michael moves to Iowa and it is his first fall hunting Iowa as a resident. After scouting public ground all summer and early fall, things come together for him in November on an awesome hunt over a decoy

programme.title: Tradition
programme.desc: Josh heads to Camp Dinkota in North Dakota to kick off the late season push and arrows an awesome whitetail. Then Dylan joins Josh in deer camp and only a day later after Josh kills a good buck, Dylan has an opportunity at another great whitetail

programme.title: Commotion
programme.desc: Brennen heads to Kansas after a couple of years of not drawing a tag. After a bunch of scouting on public land and a few non productive sits, it all comes together during a classic rut hunt over a decoy in late November

programme.title: Beauchene Bass Bash
programme.desc: Taylor and Brittany target smallmouth bass in Northwestern Quebec, while exploring the waters of Beauchene Wilderness Lodge

programme.title: Crossbow Spring Turkey
programme.desc: Taylor goes on a spring turkey hunt in Ontario, and provides key fundamentals for success

programme.title: Mulies in the Snow
programme.desc: Taylor is Alberta bound in search of mule deer

programme.title: Shiras Moose: The Ghost of Southern Alberta
programme.desc: Steve's pursuit of the elusive Shiras Moose, known as the \"Ghost of Southern Alberta,\" is a culmination of his 12-year quest to complete his North American 29 collection. With dedication and passion, he ventures into the vast wilderness, determined to capture this elusive species on camera

programme.title: BC Borderland Bulls
programme.desc: Embark on BC's wilds with hunters Joe Eppele & Steven Dahn. Tracking majestic elk, witness challenges, camaraderie, & nature's beauty unfold. Join the camaraderie, witness the primal connection with nature, and live the hunt like never before

programme.title: A Decade of Dominance with Steve Ecklund
programme.desc: Celebrate a decade of wilderness exploration with Steve Ecklund, as he marks ten thrilling years of capturing his hunting adventures on film. From rugged landscapes to awe-inspiring encounters, join him in reliving the exhilarating journey of a true outdoorsman

programme.title: Trav’s First BC Black Bear
programme.desc: Travis \"The Timberwolf\", is in BC on a spot and stalk archery black bear hunt. After looking over a ton of bears this season, he has his heart set on taking his first BC black bear with his bow. Being as stealthy as possible Trav and Cheese are able to sneak into 15 yards of the bear and make a great shot. Trav then heads to the kitchen to make a delicious bear ham with the entire hind quarter

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 1
programme.desc: Join Mitch and Lynn as they head out by horseback on a high country elk hunt after some late season bulls for their 2nd wedding anniversary. The air is thin and cold but the action is hot and heavy. The horses are saddled and the excitement is high as the romantic couple find bulls on almost every ridge top

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing with their anniversary hunt, Mitch and Lynn are in the high country on an elk hunt in search of late season horseback bulls. With some hunting pressure in the area from other hunters, they move to a new location and find multiple bulls in a high country saddle. With lots of daylight left they wait them out and put a great bull on the ground!

programme.title: Drum Roll
programme.desc: Sandy beaches and driftwood make the perfect spot for wading out into the shallows to kick off spring fishing for freshwater drum. Josh is accompanied by newcomer Joe, and teaches him to navigate the lake in hip waders. In an area ripe with cattails, Josh shows Joe how to harvest and pickle these unsuspected treats

programme.title: Wild Turkey Confit
programme.desc: Surrounded by endless oaks on the edge of a ranch, Josh sets out to find a spring turkey, the key ingredient in a delicious riverside supper hes planning to make. He is accompanied by Chad, a local archery hunter whos there to help in the hunt and partake in the dinner

programme.title: The Stone Oven
programme.desc: In British Columbia, there is a legend of an ancient stone oven that was built in the mountains during construction of the railroad. Josh sets out on a trip to reconnect with his brothers, do some fishing, explore and ultimately search for this 100-year-old oven if he has come all this way, a meal is in order

programme.title: Women Best Canada
programme.desc: Women Best Canada

programme.title: NHL Best Canada
programme.desc: NHL Best Canada

programme.title: Andy Bean in Southwest Florida
programme.desc: Andy Bean in Southwest Florida

programme.title: Sanibel Goliath Grouper
programme.desc: Sanibel Goliath Grouper

programme.title: Top Celebrity Fish Catches!
programme.desc: Over his 34 years on TV, Henry Waszczuk has had more than 100 celebrity guests on camera & theyve landed some pretty nice fish. This special will keep you at the edge of your seat with some great catches, featuring Henrys top celebrity guests

programme.title: Redfish, Snook & Pompano Too!
programme.desc: Pompano are known as one of the finest tasting saltwater fish. They are feisty and fight hard for their size. Henry Waszczuk heads to the quaint fishing village of Cortez to tangle with these tasty fish

programme.title: Nonacho Lake Fishing Adventures
programme.desc: Wes books a self-guided fishing trip north of the 60th parallel and does battle with the monster lake trout swimming within the depths of the 8th largest lake in the NWT

programme.title: Year-End Episode
programme.desc: Wes gives us a look at some of the highlights & unseen footage from the year

programme.title: Spot & Stalk Bow Fishing for Carp
programme.desc: Wes combines archery and fishing and takes on shallow-water carp in southern Saskatchewan

programme.title: Pend Oreille Waterfowl
programme.desc: The Pend Oreille River in northeast Washington is a waterfowl magnet and provided a perfect setting for close friends to enjoy time together in the blind. The ducks and geese keep the guys engaged between stories of days gone by

programme.title: Kettle Falls Walleye
programme.desc: Bob Loomis and Britton Ransford join Rich Harrod on a walleye fishing adventure to the upper reach of Lake Roosevelt. The fish are numerous and the bite is on in this beautiful part of the Columbia River

programme.title: Passing on a Hunting Traditon
programme.desc: The Martin fathers are teaching their daughters and sons to hunt elk in the juniper country of eastern Oregon. Horses helped the family get to the high ground where elusive bulls could be found, but the ride doesn’t guarantee success

programme.title: Gobble Gobble
programme.desc: This week on Hit Squad Outdoors, it's all about the turkeys

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Join five time UFC Champ, Tim Sylvia, in the outdoors hunting and fishing

programme.title: Dangerous Gator
programme.desc: Blaine is in a small dingy and things get a little crazy when a gator tries to get him inside the small boat

programme.title: The Show
programme.desc: Producer Eric Orton travels remote logging roads to witness extreme hatchery operations with Steve Lacasse, Debbie Anderson, and husband Grant Anderson on Northern Vancouver Island

programme.title: The Icebox
programme.desc: Northern Manitoba holds some of the biggest lake trout on the planet. Guides from Bakers Narrows Lodge explain the benefits of catch and release while battling extreme weather warnings on their way to becoming Master Anglers

programme.title: The Gateway
programme.desc: The Gateway is fed by ancient glacier rivers with an abundance of sockeye salmon and the predators that feed on them. Eric Orton talks about his time off-shore fishing Port Hardy

programme.title: It’s Like Candy for Pike
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. When the bite slows, how do you entice the giants? Check out this finesse presentation that always works time and time again on the inactive brutes

programme.title: A Trick or Two for Bass
programme.desc: Today’s destination takes Charlie up to the Land O’ Lakes area of Eastern Ontario for smallmouth bass. Charlie joins up with friend Chris McMillan as the two enjoy a day of bass fishing. The two share techniques for clear water lakes

programme.title: Hooked on Lake Trout and Untouched Walleye
programme.desc: Today’s destination is Cree Lake in Northern Saskatchewan. Check out Charlie’s tip on modifying your tackle for large lake trout. Then, off for an often ignored walleye bite that will have you wanting more

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 1
programme.desc: Watch this week as Ted, Amber and country music singer Heath Sanders go to hunt mule deer in Texas

programme.title: Hunting Mule Deer - Part 2
programme.desc: Ted and country music singer, Heath Sanders chase mule deer and then it’s off to do some airgun hunting on some Texas deer!

programme.title: Revelstoke ATV Adventure
programme.desc: The boys take to the trails in Revelstoke, BC with members of the Revelstoke ATV Club

programme.title: White Lake BC Trout
programme.desc: Back to BC, on the beautiful waters of White Lake looking for trophy rainbows

programme.title: Kokanee Springs Escape
programme.desc: Jason tees off as Blair runs the cart and the boys explore Crawford Bay, BC and Kokanee Springs Resort

programme.title: YouTube Hog Hunt Special
programme.desc: Today we're doing something a little different, we're giving you a little history on our YouTube channel and showing some of our favorite posts. Then, we’ll show three of our best hog hunts that have never aired anywhere but YouTube

programme.title: Swamp Hogs & Mickey Gilley Dedication
programme.desc: We join Keith on a thermal hog hunt, later he introduces us to his friend Shannon Tracy from UVC Powersports as both Shannon and Keith talk about the life and career of country music legend, Mickey Gilley

programme.title: Thermal Rampage
programme.desc: Keith Warren and his daughter meet up with Team Swamp Stomp for a Texas hog hunt in the dead of night using some killer Pulsar thermal scopes! Joining them is Garrett Streitz of APF, who decks out the team with some top-notch .308 Caliber AR-10s for the carnage!

programme.title: Dacre Part II & Mud Fest
programme.desc: Find out how the team finished at the Dacre and then they head to Mirimachi Mud Fest 2023

programme.title: Nackawic & Crabbe Mountain Inn
programme.desc: The town of Nackawic is an exceptional ATV Hero as they allow the crossing of the St. John River to connect the southern and northern parts of New Brunswick. Many towns could learn from the welcoming nature of this town. We then head to an ATV friendly Inn to further explore the area

programme.title: Adventure Day
programme.desc: The Trekkit Crew takes a bunch of first time ATV riders out on brand new Segway ATVs and SxS and have them experience riding the trails. The trip ranges from getting stuck in the mud, rock climbs, and scenic trails

programme.title: Fur Buying Event
programme.desc: Join Kent Maitland and fellow trappers as he inspects, grades and purchases, shed antlers and prime pelts

programme.title: Punching Trails
programme.desc: Join Scott and some good friends as they help punch trails in deep snow

programme.title: Cold November Set Up
programme.desc: Scott heads down to Valley Firearms to buy a compact dispatch rifle for the snowmobile. Then he hangs a lynx set and sets up the line on a cold November start to the season

programme.title: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Gary Bartels and Steve Holden take OATH registered heroes Clint Kelly and Terrance Flemons to Rock Water Ranch in Texas to do population control on hog

programme.title: African Adventure
programme.desc: The Ultimate OATH joins veteran Tim Crawford in South Africa with Cheetah Safaris for a bucket list safari hunt

programme.title: Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt - Part 1
programme.desc: Hosts Gary Bartels and Steve Holden take OATH heroes Master Sergeant Gilberto Tony Roman and Marine veteran Dave Kochmanski to Canada to hunt black bears with Harvest Lodge Outfitters for the inaugural Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt.

programme.title: Two Great Hog Hunts
programme.desc: fter participating in the Carolina Coyote Classic, John MacPherson is joined by Sean Casey of DNA Firearm systems to go hog hunting. Later he is joined by Adam Simpson for another incredible hog hunt!

programme.title: Hog & Coyote Hunting
programme.desc: John and Sean Casey help out a farmer who is having a problem with wild hogs, then it's coyote time!

programme.title: Monster Whitetails of Ohio
programme.desc: John & Beth head to Ohio with the owners of Black Widow Deer Lures, Andy & Janice. Janice harvests her first monster buck and Beth opts for a doe to collect some venison to punch her tag.

programme.title: Archery Buck
programme.desc: We join Dane as he harvests his biggest buck with a bow, and what makes this even more special is that his father JD is behind the camera

programme.title: North Carolina Buck
programme.desc: his week we join John \"JBone\" Rowland. You won't believe the buck that he harvests right outside of Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: The Reason for Monster Whitetails
programme.desc: This week we're hunting with our good friends from The Reason as they head out to try and get some monster whitetails.

programme.title: Carolina Dreamin'
programme.desc: This week, Steve Schicker travels to South Carolina to hunt with Pete Gutowski of Uslide Bowholder, this time for deer.

programme.title: Elk Fever
programme.desc: This week, we join Gerry Rightmyer as he goes on the elk hunt of a lifetime, finally getting drawn after 16 years.

programme.title: New Brunswick Bear Hunt - Part 1
programme.desc: This week the Forever Wild Outdoors cameras are filming in beautiful New Brunswick for black bear with outfitter Ben Savior.

programme.title: Deep in The Skinny
programme.desc: Capt. Nathan Chennaux reunites with old fishing buddy to put the new Towee Skiff to the test. Shallow water redfish beware!

programme.title: Cowboy Like You've Never Seen
programme.desc: Yes sir, Capt. Ed trades his Cuban coffee for some South Texas joe as Capt. Scott Null shows the Florida angler the saltier side of Texas.

programme.title: The Clam" Before the Storm"
programme.desc: Capt. Ed Zyak is joined by long time TV host and Banana River native Capt. Blair Wiggins to visit Blair's home waters to find the famed flats unrecognizable. Human impact and runoff have taken their toll, but Capt. Blair and others have a plan.

programme.title: Coastal River Chinook Salmon
programme.desc: Casting spinners and jigs for BC river chinook salmon

programme.title: Pacific Saltwater Bottom Fishing
programme.desc: Jigging spoons for BC coastal halibut and pacific cod

programme.title: Pacific Coho Salmon
programme.desc: Fishing lures and drifting jigs for coastal BC coho salmon

programme.title: Filling the Freezer
programme.desc: After a long 8 weeks the meat birds are finally ready for the freezer. Family and friends band together and join Ben & Nicole as they slaughter whats left of their chickens in hopes of being able to feed both them and Bens parents for the winter

programme.title: Winter Woes
programme.desc: Ben and Nicole have committed to a goal of self-sufficiency. Unfortunately, its proving harder than they thought. Homesteading isnt as glamourous as it may look online. Atlantic Canadian winters are proving more difficult than ever before

programme.title: Spring Cleaning
programme.desc: As winter thaws Ben & Nicole set out to tidy up the yard and prep the garden. With cleanup well underway they pick up a new honeybee hive in hopes of being able to pollinate their garden and reap some sweet, sweet homegrown honey

programme.title: Logan's Bear Blanket
programme.desc: Logan turns this bear into a rug

programme.title: Island Pheasant
programme.desc: Your host Steve Elmy is going to take you on an awesome trip to the most southern inhabited island in Canada for an epic pheasant hunt

programme.title: Sunny Skies Where the Dove Dies

programme.desc: Mitchell targets a beautiful black bear in the boreal forests of Alberta.

programme.title: Up to Us
programme.desc: Follow along as David takes us through an Iowa archery season, explaining why hunters do what they do.

programme.title: LOL
programme.desc: Watch as the Holder's release the humorous side of Raised Hunting. If you can't laugh at yourself, who can you laugh at? Someone else...

programme.title: Living
programme.desc: Join the Holder family as they take a look at an entire hunting season and how hunting mimics life.

programme.title: Feed the Whale
programme.desc: For the maiden voyage of the new Kingfisher Boats 3025 GFX Brendan wanted to bring on a very special guest. An expert of the ocean and everyone’s favourite 6 ton mammal, Fin the whale, official mascot of the Vancouver Canucks.

programme.title: Walters Cove Resort
programme.desc: Brendan Morrison and Dave Babych head to Kyuquot for an unforgettable trip to Walters Cove Resort, owned by the Kyuquot/Checleseht First Nations.

programme.title: Marlin for Marty
programme.desc: Legendary NHL Goaltender Marty Turco joins Brendan and Steve Rae in Cabo San Lucas for an epic day on the water.

programme.title: Mesquite
programme.desc: Texas is known for being target rich, and the boys have proven that. They shot so many bucks in October it barely fits into an episode!

programme.title: Spot & Stalk
programme.desc: It’s bear season in Alaska, and Mike has been waiting four years to get this permit. He’s got an itch to take down a big bear, and the Savage is sighted in.

programme.title: Axis Heat
programme.desc: It’s hot in Texas, but that doesn’t mean you can’t get in a good axis hunt. It doesn’t get better than walking, stalking and dropping an axis deer.

programme.title: The Bonnechere Cup
programme.desc: STV heads to Eganville for the Bonnechere Cup but Jeff isn't taking the quick route, he's riding Goldmember to it!

programme.title: Trails of the French Fry Capital of the World
programme.desc: STV heads back to New Brunswick and hits the trails in the french fry capital of the world.

programme.title: World Snowmobile HQ & CKX Gear
programme.desc: STV reads a book this week, checks out some gear from CKX and Jeff takes out the crap cans for a ride to see how their running!

programme.title: Amber's First Deer
programme.desc: Jimmy Sites guides singer Amber McLemore to her first deer ever, then they co-write a song that is produced by John Carter Cash.

programme.title: One MOORE to Go
programme.desc: Jimmy Sites joins Keith Moore for the last deer hunt of the season and of Spiritual Outdoor Adventures 22-year run.

programme.title: Texas Gators - Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of a hunt on the Texas coastline, Blake Barnett along with Conservation Equity Partners complete the task of baiting and harvesting alligator.

programme.title: Return To Whitetail - Part 1
programme.desc: After previously guiding a successful hunt earlier in the year in the area, Blake Barnett returns to the Lowrance in the Texas panhandle to hunt whitetail deer

programme.title: Return To Whitetail - Part 2
programme.desc: Blake Barnett continues his hunt for old whitetail deer on the Lowrance Ranch of North Texas

programme.title: Fall on Stump Lake
programme.desc: Don Freschi and Brian Chan fly fish Stump Lake in the fall using a variety of fly patterns; mainly Baby Damsels, Blobs and Leeches.

programme.title: Chironomids 101
programme.desc: Dale Freschi and good friend Ted MacDonald fly fish a beautiful lake in the Cariboo region of BC using chironomid patterns

programme.title: Fly Fishing the Weed Beds
programme.desc: Don and Dale Freschi experience extremely windy conditions that forces them into the weeds for some crazy fishing

programme.title: Team200 Canada
programme.desc: Clay Charlton , owner of Take-Em Outfitters, is the newest member of Team200 and shares his 2021 season as he chases giant whitetails in Alberta and Saskatchewan

programme.title: Cree River Monsters
programme.desc: Team200 visits the Cree River Lodge in Northern Saskatchewan to hunt giant black bear. Spot & stalk archery action plus monster northern pike!

programme.title: RAW Whitetails
programme.desc: Team200 members Chris Schmidt, Brian Rhodd, Jordan Finnigan and Mike Dempsey chase whitetails across the Midwest

programme.title: Iowa Gun Season
programme.desc: Iowa is a magical place where whitetail hunters' dreams can come true. In this episode, Jerry finds himself back in this coveted state chasing some monster bucks with Cole

programme.title: Passing The Torch
programme.desc: It's rifle season in Pennsylvania this week and we are joined by Blake VanTussenbrook and Preston Holdren and their sons. Their boys have never killed a buck before so we invited them out to try to get them on their first buck ever!

programme.title: Sooner" Or Later"
programme.desc: We're headed out to Oklahoma to follow along with the Sharp brothers as they hunt whitetails in their home state. You never know what to expect with these two but one thing you can always rely on is that they always have some big deer to go after!

programme.title: Creative
programme.desc: Michael moves to Iowa and it is his first fall hunting Iowa as a resident. After scouting public ground all summer and early fall, things come together for him in November on an awesome hunt over a decoy

programme.title: Tradition
programme.desc: Josh heads to Camp Dinkota in North Dakota to kick off the late season push and arrows an awesome whitetail. Then Dylan joins Josh in deer camp and only a day later after Josh kills a good buck, Dylan has an opportunity at another great whitetail

programme.title: Commotion
programme.desc: Brennen heads to Kansas after a couple of years of not drawing a tag. After a bunch of scouting on public land and a few non productive sits, it all comes together during a classic rut hunt over a decoy in late November

programme.title: Beauchene Bass Bash
programme.desc: Taylor and Brittany target smallmouth bass in Northwestern Quebec, while exploring the waters of Beauchene Wilderness Lodge

programme.title: Crossbow Spring Turkey
programme.desc: Taylor goes on a spring turkey hunt in Ontario, and provides key fundamentals for success

programme.title: Mulies in the Snow
programme.desc: Taylor is Alberta bound in search of mule deer

programme.title: Shiras Moose: The Ghost of Southern Alberta
programme.desc: Steve's pursuit of the elusive Shiras Moose, known as the \"Ghost of Southern Alberta,\" is a culmination of his 12-year quest to complete his North American 29 collection. With dedication and passion, he ventures into the vast wilderness, determined to capture this elusive species on camera

programme.title: BC Borderland Bulls
programme.desc: Embark on BC's wilds with hunters Joe Eppele & Steven Dahn. Tracking majestic elk, witness challenges, camaraderie, & nature's beauty unfold. Join the camaraderie, witness the primal connection with nature, and live the hunt like never before

programme.title: A Decade of Dominance with Steve Ecklund
programme.desc: Celebrate a decade of wilderness exploration with Steve Ecklund, as he marks ten thrilling years of capturing his hunting adventures on film. From rugged landscapes to awe-inspiring encounters, join him in reliving the exhilarating journey of a true outdoorsman

programme.title: Trav’s First BC Black Bear
programme.desc: Travis \"The Timberwolf\", is in BC on a spot and stalk archery black bear hunt. After looking over a ton of bears this season, he has his heart set on taking his first BC black bear with his bow. Being as stealthy as possible Trav and Cheese are able to sneak into 15 yards of the bear and make a great shot. Trav then heads to the kitchen to make a delicious bear ham with the entire hind quarter

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 1
programme.desc: Join Mitch and Lynn as they head out by horseback on a high country elk hunt after some late season bulls for their 2nd wedding anniversary. The air is thin and cold but the action is hot and heavy. The horses are saddled and the excitement is high as the romantic couple find bulls on almost every ridge top

programme.title: Late Season Horseback Bulls - Part 2
programme.desc: Continuing with their anniversary hunt, Mitch and Lynn are in the high country on an elk hunt in search of late season horseback bulls. With some hunting pressure in the area from other hunters, they move to a new location and find multiple bulls in a high country saddle. With lots of daylight left they wait them out and put a great bull on the ground!

programme.title: Drum Roll
programme.desc: Sandy beaches and driftwood make the perfect spot for wading out into the shallows to kick off spring fishing for freshwater drum. Josh is accompanied by newcomer Joe, and teaches him to navigate the lake in hip waders. In an area ripe with cattails, Josh shows Joe how to harvest and pickle these unsuspected treats

programme.title: Wild Turkey Confit
programme.desc: Surrounded by endless oaks on the edge of a ranch, Josh sets out to find a spring turkey, the key ingredient in a delicious riverside supper hes planning to make. He is accompanied by Chad, a local archery hunter whos there to help in the hunt and partake in the dinner

programme.title: The Stone Oven
programme.desc: In British Columbia, there is a legend of an ancient stone oven that was built in the mountains during construction of the railroad. Josh sets out on a trip to reconnect with his brothers, do some fishing, explore and ultimately search for this 100-year-old oven if he has come all this way, a meal is in order

programme.title: Women Best Canada
programme.desc: Women Best Canada

programme.title: NHL Best Canada
programme.desc: NHL Best Canada

programme.title: Andy Bean in Southwest Florida
programme.desc: Andy Bean in Southwest Florida

programme.title: Sanibel Goliath Grouper
programme.desc: Sanibel Goliath Grouper

programme.title: Top Celebrity Fish Catches!
programme.desc: Over his 34 years on TV, Henry Waszczuk has had more than 100 celebrity guests on camera & theyve landed some pretty nice fish. This special will keep you at the edge of your seat with some great catches, featuring Henrys top celebrity guests

programme.title: Redfish, Snook & Pompano Too!
programme.desc: Pompano are known as one of the finest tasting saltwater fish. They are feisty and fight hard for their size. Henry Waszczuk heads to the quaint fishing village of Cortez to tangle with these tasty fish

programme.title: Nonacho Lake Fishing Adventures
programme.desc: Wes books a self-guided fishing trip north of the 60th parallel and does battle with the monster lake trout swimming within the depths of the 8th largest lake in the NWT

programme.title: Allá y Entonces
programme.desc: Narra el encuentro de Temístocles con su padrino, a quien cree haber matado y ahora supone un fantasma que viene a desquiciarlo. Pasando del drama a la comedia y enredos absurdos, Temístocles enfrenta sus fantasmas hasta perder el control de su vida y llevar su economía a la bancarrota. Su esposa va a dar a luz. Al descubrir que su padrino vive, se abre la posibilidad de saldar su deuda y romper con el maleficio.

programme.title: Bruma
programme.desc: Martina se siente atrapada en una vida encasillada en la Ciudad de México. Al enterarse de su embarazo y sin saber qué hacer al respecto, decide ir a Berlín en busca del padre, e inicia un viaje donde encontrará su propia identidad.

programme.title: Cu4tro Paredes
programme.desc: Hugo es un chavo provinciano de 23 años que llega a la Ciudad de México huyendo de un grave problema. Llegando contacta con Diego, su primo hermano, a quien le pide alojamiento. Diego acepta pero insiste en que Hugo no acceda a una habitación específica, por lo que éste se queda solo en casa. Una extraña mujer aparece en el apartamento y entre los dos empieza una extraña relación en donde el sexo y los nombres no importan. Sin embargo, Hugo sabrá después quién es esa extraña mujer, provocando así la tragedia

programme.title: El Ultimo Fin de Semana
programme.desc: Diana quiere celebrar su próximo ascenso. Invita a la casa de su abuela a sus compañeros de trabajo, para pasar el fin de semana “perfecto”. Pero el pueblo esconde un gran secreto. Se dedican a pasar tres días de fiesta, sol, playa y alcohol. Aflorarán rencores, confesiones, deseo sexual, celos, tensiones… pero no están solos como creen y puede que, para más de uno, éste sea su último fin de semana

programme.title: Golpe Maestro
programme.desc: Es un plan sencillo, secuestrar a la joven heredera, sin improvisación, sigue las reglas, somos maestros de escuela, seguir las reglas no debería ser un problema, pero en la vida, las cosas pasan y los planes tienden a fracasar si no nos relajamos. Ni siquiera el cerebro de esta operación podía imaginar que nos llevaríamos a la persona equivocada. Ha llegado el momento de improvisar. Necesitamos corregir los errores, pero incluso eso podría no ser suficiente.

Corre el año 2097 que después de 30 años de paz y prosperidad se ha erradicado la letal pandemia del virus del 2067.Pero una sombra se cierne sobre las comunidades de supervivientes. Un espectro que vuelve para atormentar a aquellos que desterraron la causa de la pandemia logrando retornar a la supervivencia necesaria para sobrevivir a pesar de la lección sufrida por la humanidad desde el 2067

programme.title: Epitafio
programme.desc: En 1519, antes de llegar a la capital azteca México-Tenochtitlán, tres conquistadores españoles marchan hacia la cima del volcán Popocatépetl, de más de 5400 metros de altura. El ascenso es complicado, deben enfrentar la fuerza de la naturaleza y el temor a lo desconocido, pero su misión es de gran importancia para los intereses del ejército de Hernán Cortés

programme.title: Faraday
programme.desc: Faraday es un telépata especialista en fenómenos paranormales. Su novia, Pati, es una bloguera entregada a los cupcakes cuya máxima aspiración en la vida es ser famosa en internet. Alquilan un piso muy barato en el que al fin podrán independizarse, pero una vez instalados descubren que está encantado. “Faraday” es una historia de amor que supera todas las fronteras, incluidas las del Más Allá. Una comedia paranormal que tocará la fibra a todos aquellos que alguna vez han deseado ser “modernos”

programme.title: En La Ciudad Sin Brújula
programme.desc: En la ciudad sin brújula se convierte en el punto de encuentro de dos extranjeros que han perdido el rumbo hacia sus sueños. Anna una inmigrante húngara y Pascual un extranjero

programme.title: Club Habana
programme.desc: Bárbara es una estudiante de Artes Plásticas, que viajará a España para presentar una exposición de pinturas. Camino a una fiesta de despedida, le sorprende una tormenta y tiene que refugiarse en un viejo y decadente club nocturno al que asisten personas con intereses muy diversos y, en ocasiones, opuestos.

programme.title: Fiebre "La Película"
programme.desc: “Negro” y “Negrito” son dos pandilleros que no tienen piedad con sus víctimas, creando el caos que tiene “Ciudad Blanca” plagada de violencia y delincuencia, queriendo conquistar el negocio de la droga a toda costa.

programme.title: Cartero
programme.desc: Hernán Sosa es un joven tímido que viene del interior a la ciudad. En su pueblo siempre estuvo enamorado de una chica inalcanzable, Yanina. Hernán consigue trabajo en el correo. Durante el reparto, Hernán descubre que Yanina se encuentra en la ciudad, en la zona de su reparto. En consecuencia, comienza a desplegar sus nuevos conocimientos de cartero para llegar hasta ella. Pero a medida que se acerca, descubre que unos viejos carteros están organizando un robo en el mismo edificio donde trabaja Yanina. Envalentonado por la fuerza del amor, Hernán se enfrentará a los peligros que rodean a Yanina para llegar a declararle lo que siente.

programme.title: ¿Quieres Ser Mi Rehén?
programme.desc: Ulises, un diseñador publicitario, es tomado como rehén por una hermosa y misteriosa mujer en el día más importante de su vida y en su propia oficina. Al mismo tiempo, la exesposa de Ulises acude a su oficina y complica todavía más la situación.

programme.title: Despertar El Polvo
programme.desc: Es la historia de un hombre que ha sufrido las desgracias de vivir una vida trasgredida por la delincuencia y corrupción, el barrio de Iztapalapa es el escenario donde vaga por las calles, invisible, ignorado y solitario, sumido en su miseria. Un evento desafortunado mueve el instinto protector de Chano que intenta regresar al mundo del crimen para lograr sacar a su ahijado de la cárcel.

programme.title: De La Piel del Diablo
programme.desc: La atracción se desata entre un hombre y una mujer que se conocen en una galería de arte. Comparten gustos y aficiones, y ambos parecen ser justo lo que el otro necesita… pero lo que debería haber sido una noche de pasión, pronto se convertirá en un juego perverso, lleno de trampas y mentiras, en el que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Cauce
programme.desc: Ariel es un joven de clase media, padre de familia, que sorpresivamente pierde su trabajo en el contexto de una ola de despidos. Alterado y ocultando a su familia lo que sucedió, se escapa del cumpleaños de su suegro para ir a un club nocturno, donde un viejo conocido le ofrece formar parte de un negocio narco.

programme.title: En Un Lugar De La Mancha
programme.desc: En una pequeña localidad de La Mancha, Isabel y Silvia, cansadas de esconder su pasión, deciden marcharse un fin de semana a la casa rural que alquila el sacerdote de un pueblo cercano. Pronto lamentarán su decisión.

programme.title: El Origen de la Tristeza
programme.desc: Crece en su barrio, El Viaducto, entre la villa Mariel, las vías del ferrocarril Roca y el arroyo Sarandí. Un país está dejando de existir. La infancia va quedando atrás entre tragos de vino, colectas para pagar por sexo, amistades probadas en el peligro y el miedo.

programme.title: El Expediente Belchite
programme.desc: El expediente Belchite no es solamente una historia de miedo; como toda narración que nos habla de una trascendencia más allá de vida terrena, la película plantea interrogantes sobre la finitud, o no, de eso que algunos llaman alma.

programme.title: El Cuarto de Mona
programme.desc: Mona (Sabela Hermida) es una mujer a la que todo le va mal. En plena crisis de los cuarenta, sin trabajo, sin pareja, sin dinero y con el sueño de ser actriz decide terminar sus días tirándose por un puente, sin embargo, unas llamadas en el último momento le recordarán que queda poco para su cumpleaños. Lo que parece que puede ser un intento de volver a la normalidad en su vida desencadenará en una semana frenética con todo tipo de situaciones disparatadas.

programme.title: Después Del Azul
programme.desc: Fausto se electrocuta y queda en coma, sobrevive con la realidad alterada, escucha a la soledad y ve varias mujeres que le representan la muerte. Son mujeres asesinadas por un político para quien trabaja Fausto. Somos más de lo que percibimos. Energía que se hace visible cuando la muerte nos mira de cerca.

programme.title: Anabel
programme.desc: Tras la marcha, en circunstancias algo turbias, de Anabel, sus dos compañeras de piso deben buscar a alguien más con quien compartir el alquiler. El elegido es un señor mayor que logra ganarse su confianza, pero que pronto se descubrirá como una presencia extraña e inquietante.

programme.title: El Cielo en el Infierno
programme.desc: Romeo y Desideria están enamorados... pero a su manera. Con el paso de los años, su relación se ha convertido en un pequeño infierno, hasta el punto de que Romeo se siente maltratado y vejado constantemente. La aparición en sus vidas de una telefonista poliamorosa lo cambiará todo. Para mal, por supuesto.

programme.title: Vidas Violentas
programme.desc: integrada por seis cortometrajes escritos y dirigidos por seis de los más connotados directores mexicanos, la película fue realizada y dirigida para concientizar y reducir la violencia de género, el acoso escolar en las escuelas y la violencia doméstica. Proviene de una iniciativa del gobierno en el marco de la campaña basta no violencia

programme.title: Denzura
programme.desc: Chad es un luchador que busca ser el mejor sin perder sus principios. En la búsqueda de su sueño, conoce a Vincent, un empresario millonario que intenta arreglar las peleas de Chad para que pierda.

programme.title: El Eterno Silencio
programme.desc: Sofía y su novio escapan en secreto a un pueblo remoto lejos de la Ciudad de México. Todo va muy bien hasta que un malentendido cambia la situación y empiezan a suceder extraños acontecimientos.

programme.title: Felipe
programme.desc: Felipe un día, a sus 30 años, decide confrontarse así́ mismo, la historia intrincada de su vida ante, la inevitable y difícil realidad de sus vivencias. Los recuerdos contras tantes impactan repentinamente su mente causándole alegría y desolación.

En el año 2044, una mutación de la bacteria de la peste trajo la aniquilación a tres cuartas partes de la humanidad. Los que quedan se han organizado en refugios distantes, siempre temiendo el posible contagio. En el exterior, bandas de saqueadores controlan el territorio, haciendo valer las leyes de la supervivencia. Un objeto del pasado, encontrado por accidente, pone en marcha una serie de acontecimientos que ponen en peligro la vida de muchos supervivientes.

programme.title: Encontrando el Camino
programme.desc: Camilo es un joven altivo y malhumorado que tras la muerte de su padre siente que ya no le queda más remedio en la vida que comprometerse a delinquir bajo las órdenes de "Nico" el mafioso de su barrio, presionado por sus siniestros jefe le dará una gran lección de vida, cuando comprenda que el camino de Jesucristo es la verdadera salvación.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Whoa, whoa, whoa! Every parent has a secret so does Pinky's Mom and Bully's Dad! Their secrets are... spectacular! They are the heroes that save the Teen-Z worlds from harm and lousy zombie attacks. But obviously, they wouldn't let their kids know

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Cado adores games and toys. He is a real adult! But sometimes the real magic happens, the video game's characters became alive! Roplox, Slither, Mario and Angry birds are ready to have a battle with Cado. They're sure they'll manage to defeat him. Will they succeed? All of us know what Cado is like... Enjoy!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava and Cado have new neighbors. They aren't like the others at all because they're unicorns and Barbie with her husband Ken! But their first meet didn't go well at all. Let's find out how to find harmony with the new neighbors?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Being a mermaid's boyfriend is very difficult. BUT being a mermaid herself and ruling the whole underwater world is even more difficult It's worth getting water on any part of the body, and you're with a tail; yes, it's hard

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: OMG! Dorky found his twin in a magic mirror. Turns out Werewolf, his twin, is a super hot guy Everyone can easily fall in love with him. Little did they know, they have a fantastic superpower!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: What do you know about avocado life? Family life and adventures, magic and strange stories, healthy challenges, awkward situations and funny pranks!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava and Cado like watching ASMR videos to relax after a hard day. Ava and Cado decided to make their own ASMR videos with strange sounds. But it's not all. Today vegetables found a lot of funny activities, challenges and pranks.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Do you HATE your sibling? Yes, they are sometimes ANNOYING and you FIGHT a lot.. but no matter what, you still LOVE them!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Getting along with your annoying sibling... Seems like a serious challenge ESPECIALLY when your bro/sis likes playing JOKES and TRICKS on you. Tired of fighting with your sibling?! Form an alliance instead!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava and Cado will show you different ways to get to the hospital. But that's not all. After that, watch a hilarious story about Cado's hand got stuck in the cookie jar.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Love and adventure are good, but sometimes a couple of Avocados drown in everyday affairs, like all of us! Avocados have to go through fire and water to make a new document for themself. Oh, how many trials they will pass today!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Oh, what lies behind the image of a shy Nerd? You will be surprised, but passions boil inside this cute girl Pinky and Mermaid, watch out because it seems you have a competitor!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: What are the perks of being a boy? The girls will learn what are the problems only boys can understand and get into so many awkward situations! Because there's always a price to pay!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava and Cado wanted to spend a peaceful evening. But instead, they have to escape from zombies! The zombie apocalypse is coming! Check out what happened to Ava and Cado and how the couple will stop it.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Avocado’s life is definitely full of awkward situations, isn’t it? Therefore, we are not surprised that today they have stories full of awkward situations and clumsy moments.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Magic Teen-Z and Zombie! What do you think of this duo? The adventure of their mysterious moments together has begun

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: What is it like to be not just a sorceress, but also a princess? You think the life of a princess is full of fun and entertainment?! Nope! Princess's struggles and problems are real!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava is thinking about getting a new pet but Cado is absolutely against it. Check out this video to see what happened next.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Today is a hot day so Cado and Ava go swimming. They're planning to spend a fun day on the beach or in the swimming pool - sunbathing, swimming, sand castles and lots of cold ice-cream! What can be better?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Do you like scrolling through TikTok? Who's your favorite TIKTOK Celebrity?! Pinky, Dark, or maybe Violet?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Have you ever imagined what you would look like if you were of the opposite gender? Just imagine now you are a girl, although in the morning you were a guy

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava and Cado so much love each other, everyone knows that. But relationships are never stay the same. Avocados have the same relationship problems as humans. It’s a new day with our funny avocado couple!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: The visit to the beauty parlor turns into a real competition full of funny situations and awkward moments. These "smart" girls are ready to do all kinds of crazy things to become the most beautiful vegetable in the world!

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: The first relationship is hard, but very cool! You learn to love together, accept each other's demons, face your love problems together and solve them together. Today we'll show funny relationship situations that will make you smile.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Everything has two sides: the good side and the bad side! Same goes with eternal long vs short battle. Yeah, long legs are cool, sure! But they can be the source of problems and awkward situations, too! There's no right or wrong here. Just appreciate what you have, long and short are both beautiful You thought that long-legged girls are always doing well? No, they have their own problems too!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Younger siblings may be soooo cute But when they don't get what they want, they turn into literal devils And then, look out! Zombie apocalypse is upon us!

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.title: TeenVee

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: There are a loooot of annoying problems only girls can understand… But all teenz (boys and girls) have something in common: their problems and fails result in funny situations!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Are you a nerd or a popular student ? Who cares?! We can all have fun together; it’s just about finding the right vibe!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Imagine you live in a palace, go to balls, and dance with magical animals. You think the life of a princess is full of fun and entertainment?! Nope! Princess's struggles and problems are real!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Disney princesses are pregnant! Do you know what it means? It means that today we showed different types of pregnant women, and every pregnancy has its own funny moments and incredible situations. The story will be full of awkward situations and clumsy moments, we promise.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: A mysterious creepy girl joins Pinky's class... Now Pinky's life turns into a never-ending nightmare! Who is she and why is she so mean to Pinky?! And she is here to ruin Pinky's perfect life, make her friends turn their backs on her and steal her boyfriend!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: You may not want to admit it, but you love fast food! Who doesn’t? Avocados love to eat too! But even they have to pull themselves together and go in for sports and healthy eating.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Being popular is not all fun and games. But trying to be the perfect popular girl, boy, student, model, music star or internet sensation is exhausting... You know what makes our teenz so adorable and relatable, right? The fact that they're not, in fact, perfect!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Today we are going to watch cool stories about magical Gender switch, Body swap and changing from a boy to girl situations! Our first story is about naughty boys who were mocking a powerful witch and then they were sent to Another Dimension! And more to that, they are pretty girls now! They need to compete in basketball match to be able to come back home, but also, it's always a good time for an Extreme Makeover! Maybe this is a beginning of something new? Let's see in the future! Also our other favourite couples will face some struggles in their relationship and we hope magic will only help them, and not make everything worse...

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava wants to become a professional ballerina, but nobody believes in her. And one day she meets ex-ballerina, who was popular in the past, and starts training with her. But this ballerina has very strange ways of training. Could Ava become a real ballerina? Or nobody will see her talent?

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: What is Pinky's secret identity? Who is her evil twin and what is it feels like to kiss your crush grandmother? And what to do if your girlfriend suddenly becomes a boy?! On all that questions and some more, you can find all the answers in this episode!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Can two worlds meet in reality? Can monsters and people fall in love with each other? Don’t miss episode, where monsters meet DUH students, where love and hate go hand in hand, where characters appear from nowhere and…disappear!

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Ava is a real nerd girl and doesn't have any besties. But accidentally she gots a strange friend, who changes her life! Now Ava should choose different options to become popular and have fun! But her monster friend sometimes does very weird things.

programme.title: TeenVee
programme.desc: Let's face it, being a girl isn’t easy. All of us get into awkward situations from time to time. But Ava has managed to break all the records for having embarrassing moments... It seems like it will never end, but you can always turn the day around.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join Slime Sam on a creative adventure to build emergency animal shelters and luxury cat condos from everyday materials. These hands-on projects teach problem-solving through storytelling, turning cardboard boxes into imaginative pet habitats with fun hidden features.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Whip up refreshing watermelon juice with a playful twist using creative straws or fruity ice cubes. Then enjoy a baking challenge where every cookie comes with a surprise inside - perfect for mixing cooking skills with excitement.

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Unleash your creativity with these fun projects! Give old sneakers a glow-up with just markers – design your own custom kicks! Then, turn your old gloves into sweet cuddles by crafting a soft, adorable teddy bear! Perfect for kids who love fashion, art, and making cozy friends!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Join us for a super-cool Frozen adventure! Make Elsa’s frost-proof backpack, laptop and school supplies – perfect for icy learning! Then, build her a magical mini apartment fit for a Snow Queen! Great for kids who love Frozen, DIY crafts, and creative play!

programme.title: Slick Slime Sam
programme.desc: Get ready for double the crafting fun with these awesome DIY projects! programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.

programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - 20 Years Of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Join Nautical Channel for a full coverage of one of the most awaited nautical events in the world. We will bring you to the most exclusive events and have special insights with the best athletes and all the VIPs. We will show you what it feels like to be on board on an ultra-modern super yacht during a match race in the legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot and also take a look around inside some of the most amazing classic yachts that ever sailed.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 11
programme.desc: In this last episode of the season, we visit Zagreb, the capital of the country and one of the most popular destinations in Croatia. As a city with a rich history and an abundance of cultural events, it is the perfect place to include at the end of our Croatian adventure. Let's check it out!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1
programme.desc: Hello Sailors! It’s such a great pleasure to welcome you to the new season of Sail-ho Croatia. We’re setting off on yet another incredible journey sailing the Adriatic starting from the lush and picturesque Neretva valley and the town of Ploče. Stay tuned and enjoy the ride!

programme.title: Croatia Yacht Show & International Charter Expo - Highlight
programme.desc: Croatia Yacht Show & International Charter Expo - Highlight

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: Dis.Traction
programme.desc: The two-time world wave sailing champion Marcilio Browne, originally from Brazil, has decided to make the Hawaiian island of Maui his permanent home to pursue his passion. Dis.Traction follows Marcilio during his first training sessions leading into to the decisive season’s final contest where the greatest windsurfers compete for the ultimate prize.Following the end of contest season, Marcilio and fellow wave sailing champion Morgan Noireaux take to the mountains, or rather to the volcano for some alternative action. As the island is exposed to heavy ground swells from many directions, Marcilio and his friends are always looking for ideal spots to practice.Dis.Traction is a rollercoaster ride of action and an authentic insight into the perspective of a seasoned professional windsurfer. Shot on location it features the breathtaking beauty of the Hawaiian Island of Maui and showcases appearances of some of the sport’s greatest athletes.

programme.title: The Barrel
programme.desc: Since the first wave was ridden, surfers have shared stories and experiences to try to explain the wonders inside the waves they ride.Professional and amateur surfers, photographers and videographers around the world have the possibility to display their passion: Barrel surfing. This term is used by surfers to describe riding well inside the curve of a finely shaped breaking wave, for many described as magical.The Barrel is all about surfer’s skills, creativity and love for adventure as they look for the best waves for tube riding. Get inside the barrel of the wave, with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Bass By Kayak
programme.desc: Bass by Kayak follows a small expedition party formed by four adventurers crossing from the Australian mainland to Tasmania in sea kayaks. With a 300 km separation, a bare four hundred people have made the crossing of the Bass Strait in the modern era. Before then, Aboriginal Australians sailed in their canoes the shocking distance during the last ice age.This adventure makes strategic stops on the islands along the way; however, it is one of the toughest and deadliest journeys in the world. Adventure filmmaker Beau Miles narrates the expedition as the first ever feature film of the crossing via sea kayaks.The travellers will experience chafe, storms, bad cooking and an emerging mate-ship between men that barely know each other.Watch it now with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 7
programme.desc: After nearly a year of exciting sailing, the biennial Clipper Race is approaching its finale: the North Atlantic provides a tense final ocean crossing, with one team experiencing a major set back; we meet a crew member whose life has truly changed thanks to the race while the others reflect on this extraordinary experience. Also, there's an spectacular finish with the overall results going down to the wire.

programme.desc: We are getting ready for the AC35 and we want to look deeper on this event. We will dive into the Director's Cut before taking a quick look at the Challengers that will face off in the Louis Vuitton Cup. Then, we have a word with the defender team, Oracle Team USA before talking with challenger Franck Cammas and Groupama Team France.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 2
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of America's Cup Insight. Today, we are at the heart of the British challenge inside the Land Rover B.A.R. We will discover more about the team, the players and the big family behind the boat. Also, find out how boundaries are changing the game and find out more about the wings of change.Plunge into the action with AC35 Insight.

programme.title: Meet me in Madeira
programme.desc: Welcome to Madeira!The main island of the volcanic Portuguese archipelago is home to a wide sea life and rich ecosystem. With its subtropical climate, Madeira is a chosen destination for nautical sports enthusiasts that enjoy the paradisiac conditions of the island.From diving to surfing, sailing to coasteering, Madeira offers a wide variety of nautical activities for the avid sportsmen or just the visiting tourist. Join Andi van Zyl on an experience that only this Portuguese archipelago has to offer, from stand-up paddling to wine tasting.Discover the secrets of Madeira and get to know the heart-warming locals of the beautiful archipelago in an exclusive show on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surf's Cooking
programme.desc: Matt Bromley is a renowned big wave surfer. Ollie Swart is a chef. Together, the two best friends will embark on an adventure down Cape Town’s coastline. Foraging for food and looking for the best surf spots, Surf’s Cooking brings gastronomy to the surfing world with this beautiful friendship.Both friends will have to quickly adapt and learn about each other. For Matt Bromley, learning about foraging for food and how to cook it properly will become challenging, and Ollie Swart will have to surf past the obstacles in this nautical sport. Will they be ready to share their passion between them?Watch their adventure in South Africa on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: SXM Best Weekend
programme.desc: Ready for the best weekend of your lives? The SXM Best Weekend is one of the most anticipated Caribbean summer events of the year. A local group of young brothers and musicians called “The Red Eye Crew” decided to revolutionize the party scenario in these paradisiac islands. That is why they brought a party wave onto St. Maarten.Follow their crazy adventure as they organize this explosive event and share their inspiring story on how they came up with this idea and what drives them. A fun journey for party lovers, SXM Best Weekend will have you put your hands up and enjoy the queens of Caribbean music with blasting performances from Haitian rapper Wyclef Jean.Party your way around the Caribbean rhythm, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Surfer's Blood
programme.desc: Renowned surf photographer and filmmaker Patrick Trefz explores the essence of the sport he loves by profiling those who inspire him. Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 7
programme.desc: The first Chris Craft boat was built by Christopher Colombus Smith in 1874, and since the brand has left its mark on many. Now we have the chance to try the Capri 27, built with modern materials but the same care and precision as the old master carpenters. Then, we will discover Eleva Yachts in the Marina degli Aregai before getting onboard the Benetti 125 Rolls Royce Azipull. Come join us!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 8
programme.desc: In today's episode of The Boat Show we get on board a really special superyacht. Built by Benetti and propulsed by Rolls Royce we are on board the Benetti 125 Fast. Then, we get on board the Azimut S6 to remember the sport factor in a luxury yacht. Come join us on board!

Surfers' Blood tells the universal story of true individuals that share deep bloodlines connected to the sea.From wooden fishing boats in the Basque Country coast with oar and surfboard shaper Patxi Oliden to the metropolis of San Francisco and the eccentric computer shapes of Apple fame designer Thomas Meyerhoffer, unique people unite by a deep connection to the sea.Watch it on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: H2O Racing: Aquabike World Championship - Episode 1 Season Preview
programme.desc: Welcome to the 25th season of the UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship. The world's best jetski racers are once again looking for the UIM ABP World title in six categories: the Ski Division GP1, the Ski Ladies GP1, the Freestyle, the Runabout GP1 as well as the Ski GP Junior 3.3 and 3.2.They will prove their skills across different Grand Prixes around the world. The rider who gets the most points throughout the season will be crowned world champion.Get to know what to expect from this year's edition in this season preview.
