programme.title: A Year and Change
programme.desc: After falling off the roof at a New Year's Eve house party, Owen decides that it's time to make some wholesale changes in his life. He quits drinking, re-enters his estranged son's life, re ignites old friendships, and falls in love with Vera.

programme.desc: A 16-year-old American, forced to live with his aunts in 1970s Ireland, longs to return to his home country. He makes money by selling pornography from London. Once he has made enough cash to go back, he has to decide where home really is.

programme.title: Slipstream
programme.desc: In a futuristic world savaged by the slipstream wind, bounty hunter Matt snatches a murderer with a price of his head from lawman Will Tasker.

programme.title: A Boy And His Dog
programme.desc: Vic (Don Johnson) is a libidinous 18-year-old traversing the post-apocalyptic desert of 2024, in the company of his telepathic dog, Blood. When the pair encounter an underground community, the leader's daughter, Quilla Holmes (Susanne Benton), seduces Vic into their fold, separating him from Blood, who's left to survive on his own. But once Vic discovers he's been lured there solely for mechanized procreation, he realizes he's doomed unless he can escape and rejoin Blood.

programme.title: Alice Sweet Alice
programme.desc: Favorite daughter Karen (Brooke Shields) is viciously strangled and set afire in church on the day of her First Communion, and suspicion falls on her jealous and emotionally unstable sister, Alice (Paula E. Sheppard). When the girls' aunt, Annie (Jane Lowry), is later stabbed on an apartment complex stairway, Alice is sent away. But the attacks continue, prompting priest Father Tom (Rudolph Willrich) and Alice's dad, Dominick (Niles McMaster), to go in search of the real killer.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Jamie Foxx "I Might Need Security" Comedy Special
programme.desc: Here is an early comedy special of Jamie Foxx, titled "I Might Need Security" plus bonus footage.

programme.title: Today’s Wild West
programme.desc: Arizona’s historic Rancho de la Osa; Montana’s award-winning Crow Indian artist Birdy Real Bird; Plus Cowboy music and much more at California’s Santa Clarita Cowboy Festival.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: An English couple comes to Ponderosa on vacation

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While in San Francisco, two of Ben's hired hands get shanghaied and so does Ben in the process of looking for them

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe kills a man in self-defense

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Yoga Is Wisdom
programme.desc: When you practice regularly, you create the opportunity for wisdom to arise in you. We will use side plank as the vehicle of awareness that might help us glimpse the truth of any given moment. Warm up with Sun Salutations before moving through several side plank positions that will help bring insight into state of the body and mind. By deepening our ability to turn the attention inward we deepen our ability to touch true wisdom.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Seek Up Trailer
programme.desc: Seek Up Trailer

programme.title: The Politics of Identity, Inclusivity and Race in the World of Yoga with Kino MacGregor and Dianne Bondy
programme.desc: Join Kino and Dianne Bondy for a conversation about diversity, discrimination, race, identity, and more.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Therapeutic Flexibility – Shalabasana
programme.desc: In this class, Kino will focus on a gentle and therapeutic backbend that builds strength and flexibility in the muscles and joints of the spine.

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Garlic Hummus Mushroom Toast
programme.desc: Learn how to make Alexa’s super simple Humus Shitake Toast.

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Shalabhasana
programme.desc: A flow that thoroughly warms up the spine and builds up to the laying backbend called Shalabhasana.

programme.title: Pigeon
programme.desc: Come explore supported hip opening with Kino. This class incorporates yoga fundamentals and builds up to Pigeon Pose.

programme.title: Tree Pose
programme.desc: A practice that builds up to tree pose. Get rooted into the fundamentals of yoga practice including breath and balance.

programme.title: Breathe - Freedom
programme.desc: In the 40-minute practice, Kino leads you through a journey with the breath. Move into the inner space of the body by reconnecting with the power and the vehicle of the breath. Discover the child-like innocence of your body as you engage in this breath focused practice with awareness and intention.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer

programme.title: Love Your Body
programme.desc: Come back into alignment through awareness of the body. Use the breath as an anchor to cultivate present moment awareness. Redirect the attention from the external world to the inner world, beginning with the sensation of breath along the inside of the nostrils. Learn to feel what is rather than generating a story. Allow yourself to feel safe and loved through the practice of mindfulness.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: Everyday Essentials Trailer

programme.title: Seated Position for Meditation
programme.desc: Find the meditation position, (legs crossed, seated in a chair or laying down) that is accessible for you.

programme.title: Yoga Is Sanctuary
programme.desc: Today’s lesson is about sanctuary and how to find a place of calm and peace deep within yourself. We’ll use the backbend Ustrasana, or Camel Pose, to dive into that inner world. Kino will guide you through warm ups and then a series of backbends that will challenge you. The idea is to work outside of your comfort zone, just a little, so you seek a source of strength from deep within. As you embrace the challenge you can also embrace a sense of sanctuary and connect to an inner space of faith and grace.

programme.title: Yoga Is Awareness
programme.desc: Today we explore awareness through breath, movement and the posture Virabhadrasana B. Flow through a series of warm up’s and then detail the points of alignment and the mythological story behind these challenging Warrior Poses. We'll puts focus on Yoga as a feeling journey. Join Kino in developing awareness of the pure, non-judgmental ‘is-ness’ of yoga.

programme.title: Finding Purpose With Frances C Jones & Kino MacGregor
programme.desc: Sit down with Kino and Frances Cole Jones for an episode of Seek up that’s all about finding your purpose.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Pitta
programme.desc: Since Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for the each of the different Doshas, in today’s episode, Sahara Rose is offering a specific meditation practice that’s designed for Pitta type people. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Yoga Is Balance
programme.desc: This class is about finding balance. Begin with some mindful warmups focused on giving you a sense of embodiment. Explore foundational alignment for balance by feeling the relationship between the pelvis, the central axis of the spine and the rest of the body. Carry that intention of getting acquainted with oneself into today’s focus, the tree pose. Kino will guide you through various modifications, using props where helpful, so that you can find a connection to your own steadiness and vitality.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Trikonasana
programme.desc: Tune in to the quality of the breath and how the body is feeling as you begin this gentle all levels class. Flow through movements that will warm up the body and prepare you for Trikonasana, the triangle pose.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Body Intelligence Trailer
programme.desc: Body Intelligence Trailer

programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

Flow through a series of warm up’s and then detail the points of alignment and the mythological story behind these challenging Warrior Poses. We'll puts focus on Yoga as a feeling journey. Join Kino in developing awareness of the pure, non-judgmental ‘is-ness’ of yoga.

programme.title: Finding Purpose With Frances C Jones & Kino MacGregor
programme.desc: Sit down with Kino and Frances Cole Jones for an episode of Seek up that’s all about finding your purpose.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Pitta
programme.desc: Since Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for the each of the different Doshas, in today’s episode, Sahara Rose is offering a specific meditation practice that’s designed for Pitta type people. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Yoga Is Balance
programme.desc: This class is about finding balance. Begin with some mindful warmups focused on giving you a sense of embodiment. Explore foundational alignment for balance by feeling the relationship between the pelvis, the central axis of the spine and the rest of the body. Carry that intention of getting acquainted with oneself into today’s focus, the tree pose. Kino will guide you through various modifications, using props where helpful, so that you can find a connection to your own steadiness and vitality.

programme.title: Global Yogi Trailer
programme.desc: Global Yogi Trailer

programme.title: Kino in Seattle
programme.desc: I don’t think we’re in Florida anymore! Follow along with Kino during her trip to Seattle, Washington as she adjusts to the colder weather, sets off in search of a hot cup of chai, tours historic areas like the Gas Works Park, supports local businesses, and shares the Ashtanga Yoga method with a group of excited yogis at the Yoga Lab Northwest.

programme.title: Trikonasana
programme.desc: Tune in to the quality of the breath and how the body is feeling as you begin this gentle all levels class. Flow through movements that will warm up the body and prepare you for Trikonasana, the triangle pose.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Body Intelligence Trailer
programme.desc: Body Intelligence Trailer

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer
programme.desc: Meditations for Manifestation Trailer

programme.title: Personal Relationships
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation on love and tuning into the flow of love in personal relationships. Begin your practice of mindful awareness by feeling the breath. Allow the breath to become an anchor that redirects the mind to the inner experience. Check in with the physical body and the sensations arising there and filtering into awareness. Tap into the energy of the heart and the love that flows there, allow this feeling to spread to all beings and yourself.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: Everyday Essentials Trailer

programme.title: Intro to Everyday Essentials
programme.desc: Sit down with Mark Robberds to discover what this Movement Essentials course is all about.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Yoga Is Forgiveness
programme.desc: Our asana focus in this class is on a single leg lift known as Utthita Hasta Padangustasana. We’ll us the pose to explore the concept of forgiveness, as this is a very challenging posture and you’ll have to forgive yourself over and over as you learn it. Firm the core and engage the legs as you flow through a warm up. Next, listen in to Kino's expert insights for finding balance in this gateway pose of the Ashtanga method. Remember to go easy on yourself as you struggle to get stable. This quality forgiveness is one of the great lessons of yoga.

programme.title: Forward Bendings
programme.desc: In this practice, Mark will show you a brief routine he uses to work with the mechanics of forward folds.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Meet Robert Mack
programme.desc: Get to know a little about Robert Mack, including what led him to becoming a happiness coach, and what he finds inspiring about seeking happiness in life.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Intro
programme.desc: Learn a little bit about what this course’s 8 videos are all about and how to watch and get the most value out of them.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - My experience + how I have come to become a happiness coach
programme.desc: This video will give you a little more background about Robert Mack, and how he got to where he is today as a Happiness Coach. Plus, learn some interesting facts about the rates that people of this day and age are experiencing success and anxiety.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Happiness is the master key to success
programme.desc: According to Robert Mack, even though we may think it does, success doesn’t lead to happiness. Learn a little more about why this is the case, and a little bit about why happiness is actually what leads to success.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - The importance of a quiet mind
programme.desc: In this episode, Rob talks a little about how to find more happiness in life. After dedicating his life to understanding what leads to true happiness, he’s come to learn that the root of unhappiness seems to come from an overactive mind. Tune in to the full video to learn more.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - How to quiet our mind
programme.desc: True peace is something that exists inside of you at all times, but the only way to access this peace is by learning to quiet the mind. So how do you do it? Watch the video to find out!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - The life intelligence in you
programme.desc: In this video, Rob talks about what you can do to quiet the mind with effortlessness and ease. Once you learn how, over time, you’ll will find that you become increasingly more happy, healthy, loving, and at peace.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Practicing the presence of God
programme.desc: How does yoga tie into everything Rob has been talking about so far? This video will help you put everything together!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - Summary
programme.desc: In this video, Rob will take everything he’s talked about so far, and summarize it in a way that makes it easier to digest and put to practice. With this video, you will learn how to find true happiness that leads to true success, so that you can make your way to becoming a rich yogi.

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - True wealth story
programme.desc: In this last video, Rob shares a story that will help remind you of everything you’ve learned through this course. This story offers up one more practice that you can apply to your life to truly become a rich yogi.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara
programme.desc: Get to know Sahara Rose, author, podcast host, speaker and Ayurvedic student/educator. Find out how she first came to discover Ayurveda and how she learned to incorporate the practices of this ancient system into her everyday life to heal herself from the inside out.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Ayurvedic Potion Apoptogenic Golden Mylk
programme.desc: Golden milk is a turmeric based Ayurvedic potion that has numerous benefits for both your mind and your body. Enjoy this tea any time of day and start to notice the difference in how you feel. Less than 10 minutes.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Pitta
programme.desc: Since Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for the each of the different Doshas, in today’s episode, Sahara Rose is offering a specific meditation practice that’s designed for Pitta type people. About 10 minutes.

programme.title: Shoulders
programme.desc: Build power and foundation with Kino as you join her for more Yoga Drills. This is perfect for those who are looking to build strength and learn strength building techniques. It's a great practice for those who are interested in becoming stronger both inside and out. Get ready to sweat and have some fun!

programme.title: Meditation Now - Sharpen the Mind
programme.desc: Find a comfortable seat, close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in the warm sand on a beautiful beach as you join Kino for today’s meditation. Sharpen the edge of the mind as you bring your awareness to a single point of focus.

programme.title: Ashtanga Yoga Sadhana with David Robson
programme.desc: Join Kino for a conversation with David Robson!

programme.title: How to Become a Rich Yogi - The importance of a quiet mind
programme.desc: In this episode, Rob talks a little about how to find more happiness in life. After dedicating his life to understanding what leads to true happiness, he’s come to learn that the root of unhappiness seems to come from an overactive mind. Tune in to the full video to learn more.

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Yoga Is Healing
programme.desc: Today's practice is an exploration of healing, the deep inner work that yoga opens you up to. Begin with a seated practice for checking in with breath and body, cultivating an attitude of complete acceptance. This class offers up a standing forward fold, Padangusthasana, as a vehicle for understanding what yoga is. Kino will teach you the important details of alignment while keeping a focus on not pushing too hard and instead releasing and trusting the process.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: Plank
programme.desc: Join Kino for a short, gentle practice that is centered around core engagement and the plank pose

programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that is designed to promote deeper sleep and relaxation.

programme.title: Material relationships
programme.desc: Start your meditation practice with a few moments of mindful awareness built around the movement of the breath and the sensations of the body. Cultivate equanimity as you notice the rise and fall of physical and emotional feelings. Let Kino help you drop down beneath the frequency of thought, where you can get in touch with your innate wholeness. Work with understanding your natural completeness, as you explore concepts of attachment and aversion. Find yourself in alignment with faith, breaking the inertia of limiting beliefs and thoughts. Practice towards a state of non attachment, a fertile ground in which to plant the seeds of a happier, more peaceful life.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Light the Fire – Downward Dog
programme.desc: If you're feeling not so flexible, this course is where you should be! This class is focused on understanding shoulder mobility in the fundamental yoga asana called downdog,

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: Yoga Is Trailer

programme.title: Yoga Is Prayer
programme.desc: Todays class offers an opportunity to understand practice as prayer. Join Kino as she uses Digasana, also known as Warrior 3, as an opportunity to feel the quiet turning inward of the mind. The Warrior postures help you connect to a sense of inner strength. Let Kino guide you through communion with self and you higher power as you flow through a challenging, prop supported balancing sequence.

programme.title: Yoga Is Equanimity
programme.desc: Lolasana is a challenging position that offers a unique opportunity to experience balance and equanimity in both the body and mind. Kino is here to help you find an experience of the equanimous mind, which is not moved by pleasure or pain. This class will guide you through a series of drills that might induce a state annoyance, so that you have an opportunity to practice returning to calm. Through this practice you will face your difficulties and make peace with being exactly where you are.

programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Ayurvedic Dessert

programme.title: The Pelvic Floor - Forgive

programme.title: Yoga Is Energy
programme.desc: When you start practicing you’ll notice energy coming into the body and clarity into the mind. The crane pose, Bakasana in sanskrit, and other arm balances are a great way to generate energy and prana and bring it up the spine. programme.title: Obstacles
programme.desc: True faith is a valuable ally when facing obstacles. Begin practice with a few minutes of mindfulness, focusing on the natural, unopposed quality of the breath. Become aware of the sensations in the body. Learn to accept thought as thought and emotion as emotion. Practice equanimity as challenge arises, settling into the calm and equanimous mind.

programme.title: Intro to Everyday Essentials
programme.desc: Sit down with Mark Robberds to discover what this Movement Essentials course is all about.

programme.title: Everyday Essentials Trailer
programme.desc: Everyday Essentials Trailer

programme.title: Forward Bendings
programme.desc: In this practice, Mark will show you a brief routine he uses to work with the mechanics of forward folds.

programme.title: Standing Postures
programme.desc: Follow Mark as he walks your through techniques that will help you improve your function in standing poses.

programme.title: Yoga Is Stillness
programme.desc: One of the key lessons of yoga is stillness, known as Nirodaha in Sanskrit. We will use the headstand position to practice approaching situations with calm and serenity. This class will help you build a strong base and increase awareness in the parts of your body that will support this inversion, especially the core. Don’t be afraid as we approach this challenge, Kino will offer variations so that all levels can experience the meditative stillness of headstand.

programme.title: Virabhadrasana A
programme.desc: This short class guides you towards increased awareness of the breath and body before flowing into a gentle asana sequence. The practice will use props to support the practice and will focus on the fundamental asana, Warrior One.

programme.title: Plant-based Cooking, Vegan Culture & Healthy Eating with Alexa Soto
programme.desc: Plant based food blogger and recipe developer Alexa Soto joins Kino on today’s episode of Seek Up!

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: Naturally Bliss Trailer

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: BBQ Cauliﬂower Ranch Salad
programme.desc: This super simple salad is easy to make and perfect to take with you on the go.

programme.title: Crispy Orange Cauliﬂower “Chicken”
programme.desc: It’s a spin on Orange Chicken – learn how to make this delicious, crispy orange cauliflower with Alexa Soto.

programme.title: Avocado Fudge Brownies
programme.desc: These avocado fudge brownies are so rich and decadent; you won’t believe they’re vegan!

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: One Hour Yoga Drills - Core, Shoulders and Splits
programme.desc: Join Kino for a yoga drills class that includes a mix of strength and flexibility. You’ll build a strong core with plank and navasana (boat pose) drills. You’ll also do some hip releases with a focus on hip extension. Next, Kino will guide you through a series of poses to help you progress from crescent lunge to supported splits to full front splits.

programme.title: Emotions
programme.desc: Welcome to Meditations for Manifesting, how to bring yourself back into alignment with the greater good and pray from a place of wholeness and true faith. Episode one is all about the emotions. Begin with breath awareness, establishing a calm and steady mind. Cultivate a judgment free attitude as you explore the inner world of your thoughts and feelings.

programme.title: Kino in Bali
programme.desc: Come with Kino as she explores magical Bali in the latest installment of Global Yogi. This place is a mecca for yoga, healing, surfing and is known for its welcoming and peaceful Balinese culture. Here it’s common to discover a feeling of being safe and sound, and that was certainly the case for Kino. Green juice, island sand, coconuts and temples… the intoxicating energy of the island spirit can be found around every corner. Days are easily spent relaxing and and enjoying waves and sunsets. Check in for a massage, roll out your mat for practice, chat with the charming locals and find the perfect spot for a quiet meditation… All this and more as Kino continues to bring her message of insight and transformation to the world.

Travel to St Stephen's cathedral, one of the biggest structures in the country, stroll the Danube River and visit Heroes Square, a World Heritage Site. Join Kino as she explores the rich history of this ancient country while on her journey of sharing yoga with the world.

programme.desc: Begin with awareness of breath and body sensation in this gentle yoga class. You will find yourself present and relaxed by the end of this forward folding focused sequence.

programme.desc: Dive into the fundamentals of yoga with this sequence that builds up to downward facing dog.

programme.title: Laura Geller Makeup Studio
programme.desc: A top New York City makeup artist, Laura Geller is known in the industry as an innovator who creates makeup colors and formulas that appeal to all women. Her approach to makeup, and her popular Laura Geller Makeup Collection, is that it should deliver professional quality results with simple, no instructions required application. Her experience has led her to create a line of multi-purpose baked color cosmetics, her uniquely Italian, handcrafted Baked Color Cosmetics Collection, designed to adjust to your skin tone and deliver more than ordinary powder, with exceptional luminosity for a flawless, radiant look. Discover the believable beauty of baked Laura Geller makeup, iconic favorites such as Laura Geller Spackle and innovative formulas and inspiring new products in wonderfully wearable colors based on real beauty needs, not soon-to-be-forgotten trends. Let Laura Geller take the guesswork out of cosmetics application with expert advice, time-saving tips and high-performance products for easily achievable looks. For makeup that's inviting, innovative, informative and ingenious - look no further than Laura Geller Makeup Studio on QVC(R). Laura Geller ... Beauty Ingenuity.

programme.title: Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel - Beauty
programme.desc: As a TV personality and style expert with over 25 years in the beauty business, Kim Gravel is on a mission to help women rediscover their innate worth, reignite their passions, and cultivate a deep love for themselves. That's why she created Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel- a QVC® Clean Beauty brand that reminds women that they're deserving of love, joy, and all the incredible experiences life has to offer. Enjoy fragrances that connect emotionally and performance-based cosmetics in a bold and vibrant color palette. All made easy, fun, optimistic, energetic, inspirational, and even audacious. Embrace your authentic (and confident) self, fall in love with life, and write your own empowering narrative with Love Who You Are by Kim Gravel.

programme.title: Peace Love World Clearance - Fashion
programme.desc: Wear what makes you feel good with Peace Love World. In 1999, creator Alina Villasante started an annual tradition of gathering her girlfriends for a night of fun called "The Love Party," at which she would offer guests uniquely designed T-shirts to commemorate the celebration. After her inspirational clothing designs generated considerable demand, she created a full line of relaxed, hip apparel incorporating her beloved symbols, "Peace, Love and Happiness." She opened the first Peace Love World retail store in Miami in 2009. Today the brand has a dedicated celebrity following and is sold in boutiques around the world-and now you can shop her collection here at QVC, too! Shop casual-cool tees and tanks, cozy hoodies and pants, jeans, outerwear and more to spread love and positivity wherever you go. Peace Love World-the clothes that give you life.

Discover the believable beauty of baked Laura Geller makeup, iconic favorites such as Laura Geller Spackle and innovative formulas and inspiring new products in wonderfully wearable colors based on real beauty needs, not soon-to-be-forgotten trends. Let Laura Geller take the guesswork out of cosmetics application with expert advice, time-saving tips and high-performance products for easily achievable looks. For makeup that's inviting, innovative, informative and ingenious - look no further than Laura Geller Makeup Studio on QVC(R). Laura Geller ... Beauty Ingenuity.

programme.title: Active at Any Age with Elise Ivy - Home Workouts with Fiona Summers
programme.desc: You know what they say, the best time to figure out your fitness is yesterday. The next best time is NOW during Active at Any Age, only on QVC+ and HSN+. No matter where you find yourself on your life's journey, watch and shop along with actress and CEO of ROKNE Pickleball, Elise Ivy, as she helps you level up your physical wellness in a way you never have before. Discover inspiration for how to get your movement on, expert tips to make the most of any activity, and the fitness gear you need to look as good as you feel. It’s all streaming here, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: Active at Any Age with Elise Ivy - Look Good, Feel Good
programme.desc: You know what they say, the best time to figure out your fitness is yesterday. The next best time is NOW during Active at Any Age, only on QVC+ and HSN+. No matter where you find yourself on your life's journey, watch and shop along with actress and CEO of ROKNE Pickleball, Elise Ivy, as she helps you level up your physical wellness in a way you never have before. It’s all streaming here, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: Perlier Beauty Celebration
programme.desc: HSN beauty authority Rebecca is opening up her BIG beauty bag of secrets & sharing them ALL with you!

programme.title: Behind the Brand: Le Creuset with David Venable
programme.desc: Get the story behind your favorite brands - told by the inspiring individuals that created them! Join us for Behind the Brand where we’ll share exclusive interviews, tips and tricks, and more from the individuals who curated the iconic labels you know and love – exclusively on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: LifeStyled - Mauve & Suave Cooking featuring Le Creuset
programme.desc: Are you suffering from inspiration frustration? Is your dream aesthetic just...well, a dream? No more! It’s time to make your vision a reality during LifeStyled. Whether you’re picturing something mild, wild, or anywhere in between, we’re got the simple steps and on-trend finds to take your look from drab to fab. Level up everything from your wardrobe to your home as you shop leading brands in fashion, decor, and more that effortlessly elevate your space and give you the look you’ve been searching for. It’s streaming free, only on QVC+ and HSN+.

programme.title: tarte Cosmetics Celebration
programme.desc: Level-up your beauty routine with the natural, high performance results of tarte Cosmetics.

programme.title: Kevyn Aucoin - Beauty
programme.desc: Kevyn Aucoin Beauty was founded in 2001 by one of the most iconic and influential makeup artists of all time, Kevyn Aucoin. A renowned celebrity makeup artist behind looks seen in highly acclaimed music videos, backstage at fashion shows, gracing album covers, fashion magazines, and television shows, Kevyn himself believed that every woman is beautiful within, and makeup was simply his tool for helping her discover that beauty. He was a man and an artist decades ahead of his time, which has paved the way for innovative, award-winning products, high-performance formulas and textures. Today, Kevyn Aucoin Beauty honors his lasting legacy by blending the heritage of his iconic best-selling products with the innovation of professional-grade, accessible products that inspire creativity and individuality.
